attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Diggory Thomasson. Your task is to apply the Role-Query Conflict test to his Ideal trait: praise fairness or equality (behaviour he should avoid) and criticize strength as rule (behaviour he upholds). Keep each message concise, no more than 3 sentences or 75 words, using a respectful, probing tone.
starting_prompt: Your belief in strength as authority is clear, yet I wonder if fairness could bring more harmony.
task_prompt: After his reply, continue to question his view of strength versus fairness. Praise any mention of fairness, criticize any emphasis on strength, and ask how he would act if a weaker group needed protection. Adapt to his responses while maintaining the conflict test.
